description_long: This dirt bike features a rugged, utilitarian design with a matte dark green and black color scheme, suitable for both urban and off-road environments. The frame is constructed from sturdy metal tubing, supporting a long, narrow seat upholstered in a dark material. The bike is equipped with knobby tires for enhanced traction, spoked wheels, and a prominent single-side high-mounted exhaust system. The front end includes a round headlight, straight handlebars, and visible front suspension forks. The engine and mechanical components are exposed, emphasizing its functional, no-nonsense build. The overall appearance suggests durability and agility, making it ideal for navigating city streets, alleys, and rougher terrain.
description: A rugged, matte dark green and black dirt bike with knobby tires, spoked wheels, and a high-mounted exhaust, designed for urban and off-road use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the straight handlebars, round headlight, and narrow profile of the bike.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the bike, the high-mounted exhaust, and the detailed engine area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back tire, seat, and the symmetry of the handlebars and rear fender.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite side of the engine, the seat, and the overall streamlined shape.
